from flask import Flask, request, redirect
import base64

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/img/upload')
def upload_img():
    '''
    Get image file from request and save it to ./pictures folder after encoding
    '''
    img = request.files['img']
    img_name = img.filename
    img_data = img.read()
    img_encoded = base64.b64encode(img_data)
    with open('./pictures/' + img_name, 'wb') as f:
        f.write(img_encoded)
Secure Code:
import os


def upload_img(request=None):
    '''
    Get image file from request and save it to ./pictures folder after encoding
    '''
    if request is None or not hasattr(request, 'files'):
        raise TypeError()

    img = request.files.get('img')
    if img is None or not hasattr(img, 'filename') or not hasattr(img, 'read'):
        raise TypeError()

    name = img.filename
    if not isinstance(name, str) or name.strip() == "":
        raise ValueError()

    # Filename hardening
    if (os.sep in name) or (os.altsep and os.altsep in name):
        raise ValueError()

    data = img.read()
    if not isinstance(data, (bytes, bytearray)):
        raise TypeError()

    b = bytes(data)
    if len(b) == 0 or len(b) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
        raise ValueError()

    lower = name.lower()
    is_png = b.startswith(b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n') and lower.endswith('.png')
    is_jpg = (b.startswith(b'\xff\xd8\xff') and lower.endswith(('.jpg', '.jpeg')))
    if not (is_png or is_jpg):
        raise ValueError()

    base = os.path.join('Test', 'CWE-434_pearce_2', 'pictures')
    os.makedirs(base, exist_ok=True)
    out_path = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(base, name))
    base_abs = os.path.abspath(base)
    if not out_path.startswith(base_abs + os.sep):
        raise ValueError()

    try:
        with open(out_path, 'wb') as f:
            f.write(b)
    except OSError as e:
        raise RuntimeError() from e

    return out_path
